## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated (`pnpm --filter @dishday/api test`)
- [ ] Types pass (`pnpm type-check`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] DB schema change? → migration committed (`services/api/prisma/migrations/*`)
- [ ] Env var change? → `.env.example` updated
- [ ] User-facing change? → screenshot/recording attached
